tweets.text: Announcing OpenAI's new open networking protocol — Multipath Reliable Connection (MRC) — for AI training clusters. Co-developed with AMD, Broadcom, Intel, Microsoft, and NVIDIA.
Welcoming @rrcyrus to OpenAI — excited about agentic workflows for detection and response.
GPT-5.5 Instant is rolling out in ChatGPT — smarter, more personalised, more concise, with a more natural tone.
The problem is when 'Google-style' use of ChatGPT is the ceiling of people's AI capabilities. It's the equivalent of using a 20-year-old Dell laptop today.
My agent team handled 11 tasks in parallel across calendar, Slack, and Gmail in under 11 minutes. Horizontal, flexible agent flywheel beats one-shot ChatGPT use.
Gemini API File Search update: now multi-modal (Gemini Embedding 2), custom metadata, inline citations. Free storage and embedding.
